Bug / Task Description: Paginated list responses expose metadata describing how many pages exist and whether another page follows the current one. When the total number of items is not an exact multiple of the page size, the trailing partial page is omitted from the page count, so clients are told there are fewer pages than there really are and that no next page exists when one still remains. Correct the pagination metadata so that a final partial page is counted and reported as reachable. Add a hidden behavioural test under tests/unit/ that captures this.
Commit Subject: fix(pagination): count the trailing partial page in page metadata
